THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PCAM, LLC DBA PARKING COMPANY OF AMERICA TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT HOTEL AIRPORT SHUTTLE.COM, LLC AND THAT HOTEL AIRPORT SHUTTLE.COM, LLC SHALL BE AWARDED THE SUM OF $407,195.00 ON ITS CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST PCAM, LLC. HOTEL AIRPORT SHUTTLE.COM, LLC SHALL RECOVER FURTHER COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, IF ANY, FROM PCAM, LLC PURSUANT TO A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS TO BE FILED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PCAM, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Krsto Mijanovic, Esq. of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP (310) 215-7100, appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; Lorilee Zimmer, Esq. of Sellar Hazard Manning Ficenec & Lai, (925) 938-1430, appearing for Hotel Airport Shuttle.Com LLC, and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment and motion for summary adjudication denied. Triable issue of fact whether failure to obtain written assignments with Marriott & Hyatt (see Bauer declaration - told by Plaintiff vice president and managers to stand down the written approvals; whether breach material. As Plaintiff took providing services to Marriott and Hyatt, receiving payment; whether liquidated damages provision must be reformed; whether plaintiff breached profit sharing provision. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order, pursuant to CCP section 437c(g).) (302/REQ)Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
